title: Cycler Finder Catalogue
description: Schema v4.2 for data/catalogue.yaml. Adds segments[].center, segments[].tof_days_bounds, source_ephemeris (spec §16.7.9) to v4.1 (which added free_return_arcs[] arc-type descriptors, spec §16.7.7, to v4). Permissive on legacy v1-v3 fields (additionalProperties: true throughout); enforces the v4 structural invariants: cycler_class enum, orbit_elements frame/center enums, period.basis item shape, and the conditional physical-invariant gate (multi-arc/non-keplerian must not have top-level a/e).

id.description: Stable human-readable slug for this cycler entry.

source_ephemeris.description: Schema v4.2 (spec §16.7.9): the ephemeris model the source paper states its published numbers were computed against (e.g. 'DE405', 'DE430', 'STOUR ephemeris'). Null/absent when the source does not state one. Non-empty when present (enforced by the Python semantic gate, since JSON Schema minLength cannot apply to the null branch).

cycler_class.description: Structural kind of orbit. Default single-ellipse preserves v3 behaviour.

free_return_arcs.description: Schema v4.1 (spec §16.7.7): Russell's Earth-to-Earth free-return arc decomposition. Distinct from trajectory.segments (encounter legs). Each item is one Earth-Earth arc in Russell's notation. Null when no descriptor is available (data gap, not error). Only meaningful for multi-arc cyclers (no-op on single-ellipse / non-keplerian).

arc_type.description: Russell free-return arc type. g/G=generic, h/H=half-rev, f/F=full-rev.

resonance.description: Resonance ratio string (e.g. '3:2', '2:1', '1:1') for full-rev arcs. Always null for generic and half-rev.

tof_years.description: Time of flight in years for this Earth-Earth arc. Per Russell p.127: 'the first number in the parenthesis is the time of flight in years'. Null for full-rev arcs where TOF is determined by the M:N resonance condition, not listed explicitly.

raw_descriptor.description: Verbatim Russell descriptor token, e.g. 'g(1.4612,526.02,Ll)' or 'F(3:2,82.487,180.000)'. Preserved exactly so nothing is lost to interpretation. The arc_type/resonance fields are derived from this string.

a_au.description: Semi-major axis in AU. Null for multi-arc and non-keplerian.

e.description: Eccentricity. Null for multi-arc and non-keplerian.

cr3bp.description: CR3BP identity tuple for non-keplerian orbits.

invariants.description: Cycle-level identity descriptors for multi-arc orbits.

segments.description: OCM TRAJ-model encounter legs. Permissive (additionalProperties: true) on legacy keys; v4.2 only constrains the two additive optional keys center and tof_days_bounds.

center.description: Schema v4.2 (spec §16.7.9): body the segment's conic/arc is centred on. Absent => 'Sun' (heliocentric, the status quo). Free string (consistent with orbit_elements.center); no enum, to allow planet-centric (moon-tour) cycler segments (issue #76).

tof_days_bounds.description: Schema v4.2 (spec §16.7.9): published time-of-flight range [min, max] in days, for sources stating a range rather than a point. Both > 0 and min <= max (order enforced by the Python semantic gate). NOT required to contain tof_days when present — different model framings of the same leg may both be sourced (e.g. Aldrin outbound tof_days=146 circular-coplanar vs Rogers et al. 2012 STOUR range 161-172 d).
